Miniforge3
==========

# Available modules


The overview below shows which Miniforge3 installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using Miniforge3, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load Miniforge3/25.3.0-3
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
